hero.title: LITHTECH AND BATERINO
hero.subtitle: We work together to bridge the gap between advanced energy storage technology and real-world energy infrastructure.

lithtech.title: LITHTECH
lithtech.subtitle: TECHNOLOGY DEVELOPMENT
lithtech.intro: LithTech is responsible for the development and manufacturing of advanced energy storage technologies. Their role includes:
lithtech.bullet1: Designing and manufacturing battery energy storage systems
lithtech.bullet2: Developing battery management and safety architectures
lithtech.bullet3: Ensuring compliance with international standards and certifications
lithtech.bullet4: Advancing system performance, safety, and intelligence
lithtech.closing: LithTech focuses on technology excellence at system level.

baterino.title: BATERINO
baterino.subtitle: INFRASTRUCTURE ENABLER
baterino.intro: Baterino is responsible for transforming technology into deployable, long-term infrastructure. Our role includes:
baterino.bullet1: Integrating LithTech technologies into complete energy systems
baterino.bullet2: Adapting solutions to real operating environments
baterino.bullet4: Supporting systems throughout their operational lifecycle
baterino.closing: Baterino focuses on execution, integration, and long-term reliability.

longTerm.title: A PARTNERSHIP BUILT FOR LONG TERM
longTerm.subtitle: FROM FACTORY TO REAL WORLD APPLICATIONS
longTerm.intro: This collaboration is designed to scale responsibly — expanding into new regions, applications, and project types while maintaining consistent standards.

factoryToField.title: FROM FACTORY TO FIELD
factoryToField.description: They succeed when they operate safely and reliably in real environments — across communities, industrial sites, and maritime operations.

sharedStandards.title: SHARED STANDARDS
sharedStandards.description: The partnership is guided by shared principles:
sharedStandards.closing: These principles ensure that technology and delivery are aligned from design through operation.

appliedAcrossSectors.title: APPLIED ACROSS SECTORS
appliedAcrossSectors.description: The Baterino-LithTech partnership enables systematic storage deployment across:
appliedAcrossSectors.closing: Different use cases. One integrated approach.

hero.title: BUILD THE FUTURE WITH US
hero.subtitle: Join a team shaping meaningful projects through collaboration, innovation, and impact.

hero.title: Enabling Energy Storage Infrastructure Worldwide
hero.subtitle: We integrate trusted green energy technologies to deliver reliable solutions for communities, industry, medical and maritime environments.

slide1.title: Industrial Energy Storage Infrastructure
slide1.subtitle: We integrate technology, delivery, and coordination to turn complex energy projects into operational infrastructure.

slide2.title: Solutions For Real Environments
slide2.subtitle: Energy storage systems designed and delivered for industrial, residential, and maritime conditions.

slide3.title: After-Sales & Lifecycle Support
slide3.subtitle: Our responsibility continues beyond delivery — supporting performance, reliability, and system continuity over time.

slide4.title: Infrastructure With Purpose
slide4.subtitle: Energy infrastructure that supports communities, essential services, and long-term resilience.

whatWeEnable.title: WHAT WE ENABLE
whatWeEnable.subtitle: ACROSS SECTORS
whatWeEnable.intro: We integrate trusted green energy technologies into dependable, infrastructure-grade energy systems designed to serve communities, industrial operations, and maritime applications in real-world operating environments.
whatWeEnable.residentialDesc: Energy storage solutions that empower local communities and improve energy access.
whatWeEnable.industrialDesc: Scalable storage infrastructure designed for performance, stability, and optimization.
whatWeEnable.medicalDesc: Energy storage solutions for healthcare facilities, clinics, and medical infrastructure.
whatWeEnable.maritimeDesc: Advanced battery systems supporting decarbonization beyond the shoreline.
whatWeEnable.utilityDesc: Utility-scale storage for grid stability and renewable integration.

howWeDeliver.title: HOW WE DELIVER
howWeDeliver.subtitle: FROM CONCEPT TO OPERATION
howWeDeliver.intro: Baterino enables energy storage projects by combining technology integration, operational delivery, and long-term support. We remove technical, logistical, and structural barriers so projects can move from concept to operation with confidence.
howWeDeliver.step1Desc: We bring together the technologies, partners, and logistics required to make energy storage projects deployable in real-world environments.
howWeDeliver.step2Desc: We integrate energy storage and renewable technologies into coherent, site-ready systems designed for residential, industrial, and maritime applications.
howWeDeliver.step3Desc: Our involvement continues beyond commissioning. We support system performance over time through a long-term, reliability-driven approach.
howWeDeliver.step4Desc: For selected projects, Baterino can support project structuring and access to funding through strategic financial partners — enabling full or partial financing where appropriate.

builtOnTrust.title: BUILT ON TRUST. DESIGNED TO LAST.
builtOnTrust.subtitle: Our global solutions
builtOnTrust.col1Desc: We engage with projects beyond delivery. Our role continues through operation, support, and system lifecycle — ensuring continuity and accountability.
builtOnTrust.col2: Technology you can rely on over time
builtOnTrust.col2Desc: Baterino integrates proven, bankable energy technologies selected for performance, safety, and long-term viability across residential, industrial, and maritime environments.
builtOnTrust.col3Desc: Through structured after-sales pathways and technical support, we help ensure system reliability throughout its operational life.
builtOnTrust.col4: Built as infrastructure, not as products
builtOnTrust.col4Desc: We approach every project as infrastructure — designed to integrate into real operating environments, regulatory frameworks, and long-term energy strategies.

globalImpact.title: OUR GLOBAL IMPACT
globalImpact.subtitle: BUILDING RESILIENCE WORLDWIDE
globalImpact.intro: Access to reliable energy shapes opportunity, resilience, and growth. Baterino's impact programs apply the same infrastructure expertise used in industrial and maritime projects to support communities and essential services around the world.
globalImpact.alignedGoalsDesc: Baterino & LithTech aligns its impact initiatives with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals, aiming to contribute across all 17 goals by 2035 through practical energy infrastructure delivery.
globalImpact.energyWhereDesc:
Reliable energy is foundational for essential services and daily life. Baterino & LithTech focuses impact efforts where power availability directly affects health, education, water systems, and community resilience.
We prioritize projects where energy reliability is not optional — but critical.
globalImpact.beyondDesc: Our impact work goes beyond system installation. We deploy practical, scalable energy infrastructure designed for real operating conditions — supported through integration, local engagement, and long-term responsibility. Impact is achieved through systems that continue to perform, not one-off deployments.
globalImpact.inclusiveDesc: The energy transition must work across different realities. By combining technology integration, lifecycle support, and adaptable system design, Baterino helps communities build energy systems that support both present needs and future growth. Inclusion comes from infrastructure that can be maintained, expanded, and relied upon over time.

footer.aboutUsDesc: Baterino enables energy storage infrastructure for communities, industry, and maritime applications, integrating proven technologies from partners such as LithTech with a focus on reliability, safety, and long-term performance.
footer.socialImpactDesc:
For social impact partnerships and initiatives, contact:
social@baterino.com

hero.title: RESIDENTIAL ENERGY STORAGE
hero.subtitle: From individual homes to entire communities, Baterino enables residential energy storage solutions built for resilience, reliability, and long-term impact.

individual.title: RESIDENTIAL STORAGE FOR INDIVIDUAL USERS
individual.desc1: Residential energy storage systems allow individual households to store energy and use it when needed. These systems are designed to operate independently or in combination with renewable energy sources, such as solar.
individual.desc2: Baterino enables residential storage solutions as part of integrated home energy systems, adapted to local conditions and usage patterns.
individual.power: ~5kW to ~16 kW per cabinet installed power
individual.focusIntro: We focus on system quality and reliability, not just equipment delivery.
individual.focus1: Reliable and safe residential battery systems
individual.focus3: Scalable configurations for different household needs
individual.keyAdvantagesIntro: Residential energy storage strengthens reliability, control, and long-term energy resilience.
individual.advantage1: Reliable power during outages and grid instability
individual.advantage2: Greater energy independence and control over energy use
individual.advantage3: Optimized use of renewable energy through energy storage
individual.advantage4: Improved cost management by reducing exposure to peak tariffs

microgrids.title: MICROGRIDS FOR OUR COMMUNITIES
microgrids.desc1: Microgrids provide communities with reliable, localized energy systems that can operate independently or in parallel with the main grid. By combining generation, storage, and intelligent control, microgrids enable energy access, resilience, and long-term sustainability.
microgrids.desc2: Baterino enables community microgrids as infrastructure systems, designed to support real operating environments and long-term use.
microgrids.power: ~50kW to ~5 MW based on micro-grid configuration
microgrids.focusIntro: Each microgrid is structured around the specific needs of the community it serves.
microgrids.focus2: Integration of storage, generation, and control
microgrids.focus4: Adaptation to local regulatory and environmental conditions
microgrids.advantagesIntro: Microgrids support both daily energy needs and critical services during disruptions.
microgrids.advantage2: Islands and remote or off-grid locations
microgrids.advantage4: Water, sanitation, and essential services and community centers

hero.title: INDUSTRIAL ENERGY STORAGE INFRASTRUCTURE
hero.subtitle: Baterino enables scalable, high-performance energy storage solutions for industrial facilities, commercial operations, and grid-connected environments.

cabinet.title: CABINET-BASED INDUSTRIAL STORAGE SYSTEMS
cabinet.desc1: Cabinet-based energy storage systems enable a flexible and modular approach to industrial energy storage. They are designed for facilities that require scalable capacity, efficient use of available space, and integration with existing electrical systems.
cabinet.desc2: Baterino enables cabinet-based systems as integrated infrastructure components, adapted to the electrical, operational and regulatory needs of each site.
cabinet.power: ~30 kW to ~220 kW per cabinet installed power
cabinet.focus3: High safety standards and integrated protection

containerized.title: CONTAINERIZED & LARGE-SCALE STORAGE SYSTEMS (BESS)
containerized.desc1: Containerized battery energy storage systems (BESS) enable higher-capacity and higher-power deployments for industrial complexes, grid-connected systems, and critical infrastructure. These systems are designed as self-contained energy infrastructure units, capable of operating in demanding outdoor and industrial environments.
containerized.desc2: Baterino enables containerized BESS as long-term power infrastructure, with temporary installation capability.
containerized.power: ~0.5 MW to ~2.5 MW per container / system block installed power
containerized.focus3: Integrated thermal management and fire protection
containerized.focus4: Pre-configured control and monitoring for remote operation
containerized.app4: Peak shaving, load management, and energy arbitrage
containerized.app5: Backup power for critical industrial operations

hero.title: MARITIME ENERGY STORAGE INFRASTRUCTURE (EES)
hero.subtitle: Baterino enables marine-grade energy storage systems designed for safety, performance, and long-term operation across vessels and offshore environments.

systems.title: MARINE BATTERY ENERGY STORAGE SYSTEMS (ESS)
systems.intro: Baterino enables modular marine battery energy storage systems built around:
systems.feature1: Lithium Iron Phosphate (LFP) chemistry for enhanced safety and longevity
systems.feature2: High-voltage DC architectures suitable for marine power systems
systems.feature3: Stackable modules allowing flexible system sizing
systems.conclusion: These systems are engineered to operate reliably in demanding marine conditions, including vibration, humidity, salinity, and corrosive environments.
systems.safetyIntro: Maritime energy storage demands the highest safety standards. We enable systems designed with:
systems.safety1: Battery cell and module design prioritizing thermal stability
systems.safety5: Alignment with marine classification and compliance

delivery.title: HOW DO WE DELIVER
delivery.step1Desc: We align technologies, partners, and system architecture to create integrated energy solutions that are technically sound, compliant, and ready for real-world deployment.
delivery.step2Desc: We adapt each system to its operating environment, ensuring designs meet specific technical, regulatory, and operational requirements across different applications.
delivery.step3Desc: We support installation and commissioning to ensure systems are deployed correctly, tested thoroughly, and prepared for stable, reliable operation from day one.
delivery.step4Desc: We remain involved beyond commissioning, supporting system performance through structured after-sales pathways and a long-term, reliability-focused approach.
delivery.step5Desc: We coordinate with technology providers, integrators, and local partners to ensure smooth execution, accountability, and long-term operational success.

applications.title: TYPICAL MARITIME APPLICATIONS
applications.subtitle: Applicable across diverse marine vessels and offshore operations with demanding safety and performance requirements.

hero.title: OUR DELIVERY FRAMEWORK
hero.subtitle: Baterino enables energy storage projects through integration, coordination, and long-term support — turning complex technologies into reliable infrastructure.

framework.title: OUR DELIVERY FRAMEWORK
framework.intro: Baterino delivers energy infrastructure through a structured, repeatable framework designed to reduce risk and enable long-term performance.

item1.title: Infrastructure Enablement
item1.desc: We bring together the technologies, partners, and logistics required to make energy storage projects deployable.
item1.point1: Technology selection aligned with project needs
item1.footer: Our role is to remove barriers — technical, logistical, and structural — before they become risks.

item2.title: Technology Integration
item2.desc: We integrate energy storage and renewable technologies into coherent, site-ready systems designed for residential, industrial, and maritime applications.
item2.point3: Compatibility across multiple technologies and vendor ecosystems

item3.title: After-Sales & Reliability
item3.desc: Our involvement continues well beyond commissioning. We support systems throughout their operational life by:
item3.point1: Establishing structured support and service pathways
item3.point2: Supporting performance continuity and system stability
item3.footer: Reliability is not a feature. It is the result of long-term commitment.

item4.title: Project Structuring & Funding Support
item4.desc: For selected projects, Baterino can support project structuring and access to funding through strategic financial partners.
item4.point1: Coordination with institutional and project finance
item4.point2: Support for bankable structures and regulatory
item4.point3: Alignment of global standards with local execution

consistency.title: BUILT FOR CONSISTENCY
consistency.intro: Baterino delivers energy infrastructure through a disciplined, repeatable approach that applies across projects, sectors, and regions.

col1.title: Cross-Cutting Capabilities
col1.desc: Across all delivery stages, Baterino brings capabilities designed for scale and replicability:
col1.subtitle: These capabilities include:
col1.point3: Adaptation of regulatory and compliance requirements
col1.point4: Deployment across diverse project types and geographies

col2.title: A Long-Term Commitment
col2.desc: Energy storage systems are built to operate for years — in many cases over a decade. Our infrastructure work this horizon in mind:
col2.subtitle: Our commitment includes:
col2.footer: Our responsibility does not end at commissioning — it continues throughout the system lifecycle.

col3.title: Delivery Across Sectors
col3.desc: The Baterino delivery framework scales across multiple sectors:
col3.subtitle: Our capability include:
col3.point1: Communities — enabling resilient, community and off-grid infrastructure
col3.point2: Industrial — supporting facilities with performance, reliability, and scale
col3.point3: Maritime — delivering systems that meet safety and operational demands
col3.point4: Emerging markets — deploying infrastructure in environments where reliability is not optional

hero.title: GLOBAL IMPACT
hero.subtitle: Baterino builds energy systems that support essential services and strengthen community resilience around the world.

essentialServices.title: ENERGY FOR ESSENTIAL SERVICES
essentialServices.intro: Reliable energy is foundational for healthcare, education, water infrastructure, and other critical community services. Baterino & LithTech focus impact efforts where power availability directly affects health, education, and community resilience.

infrastructure.title: INFRASTRUCTURE WITH PURPOSE
infrastructure.intro: Baterino enables 20+ units of micro-grid standalone, aiding villages, and others throughout various industries. Impact is created through infrastructure that continues to perform over time.

community.title: COMMUNITY ENERGY & SOCIAL PROGRAMS
community.intro: We support community-focused energy systems — building infrastructure for storage and microgrids use. Projects prioritize reliability, maintainability, and future scalability.

globalAlignment.title: GLOBAL ALIGNMENT & LONG-TERM IMPACT
globalAlignment.intro: Baterino aligns its impact initiatives with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals, committing to contribute through responsible energy infrastructure delivery. Across its projects, Baterino applies long-term, reliability-focused solutions that support energy access, essential services, and resilient communities.
globalAlignment.logoText: Baterino contributes to the UN SDG through the delivery of reliable energy infrastructure where it has direct influence.

hero.title: About Baterino
hero.subtitle: We enable energy infrastructure built to perform and built to last.

whoWeAre.title: WHO WE ARE
whoWeAre.intro: Baterino is a global energy infrastructure enabler focused on delivering reliable energy storage solutions for communities, industry, and maritime environments.
whoWeAre.description: We operate at the intersection of technology integration, project delivery, and long-term system support — bringing together proven technologies, local execution, and lifecycle responsibility to turn complex energy projects into working infrastructure.
whoWeAre.role: Baterino is not a product manufacturer. We are an integrator and delivery partner, enabling energy systems designed to perform safely and reliably over time.

vision.title: VISION
vision.description: A future where energy infrastructure is resilient, inclusive, and built to support communities, industry, and essential services — wherever reliability matters most.

mission.title: MISSION
mission.description: To enable reliable, safe, and long-term energy infrastructure by integrating proven technologies and supporting projects throughout their full lifecycle.

whatWeDo.title: WHAT WE DO
whatWeDo.intro: Baterino enables energy storage projects through a combination of technical, operational, and lifecycle services.

technology.title: TECHNOLOGY IMPORT AND DISTRIBUTION
technology.description: We import and distribute proven energy storage technologies selected for performance, safety, and long-term viability across different operating environments.

integration.title: SYSTEM INTEGRATION & PROJECT ENABLEMENT
integration.description: We integrate technologies into complete, site-ready energy systems — aligning equipment, engineering, logistics, and delivery requirements.

afterSales.title: AFTER SALES & LIFECYCLE SUPPORT
afterSales.description: We support systems beyond installation through structured after-sales pathways, ensuring continuity, maintainability, and long-term performance.

infrastructure.title: INFRASTRUCTURE ENABLEMENT
infrastructure.description: We help projects move from concept to operation by addressing technical, logistical, and structural challenges — enabling deployment at scale.

whatWeDo.tagline: Baterino enables energy infrastructure built to perform and built to last.

vulnerable.title: Support for vulnerable groups
vulnerable.description: Through targeted programs and partnerships, Baterino provides discounts or preferential access for senior citizens, support initiatives for low-income households and community-based energy assistance programs.

whenNeeded.title: There when you need us
whenNeeded.description: Energy infrastructure has a direct impact on quality of life, resilience, and opportunity. Alongside commercial projects, we support initiatives that extend reliable energy access to communities and individuals who need it most.

disaster.title: Disaster Relief & Emergency Support
disaster.description: In times of natural disasters or infrastructure disruption, Baterino supports emergency energy solutions and relief initiatives to help restore essential power services.

community.title: Community Energy Support
community.description: We contribute to community-focused energy projects that improve access to reliable power for essential services, shared infrastructure, and underserved areas.

hero.title: ABOUT LITHTECH
hero.subtitle: A global energy storage technology provider focused on marine, industrial, and commercial energy storage systems.

about.title: ABOUT LITHTECH
about.paragraph1: Founded in Shenzhen, LithTech specializes in the development and manufacturing of high-safety, high-reliability battery energy storage systems, with a strong emphasis on marine and infrastructure-grade applications.
about.paragraph2: LithTech operates as a technology manufacturer and solution developer, delivering certified energy storage systems designed for long-term, demanding operating environments.

vision.title: VISION
vision.description: To support the global energy transition by enabling safer, smarter, and more inclusive energy systems through advanced storage technologies.

mission.title: MISSION
mission.description: To safeguard a sustainable energy ecosystem by delivering safe, reliable, and intelligent energy storage technologies across marine and industrial applications.

whatWeDo.title: WHAT LITHTECH DOES
whatWeDo.intro: LithTech develops and manufactures energy storage systems across multiple application domains.

card1.title: INDUSTRIAL & COMMERCIAL ENERGY STORAGE
card1.description: LithTech delivers cabinet-based and containerized energy storage systems for industrial parks, commercial facilities, and hybrid energy projects.

card2.title: MARINE ENERGY STORAGE SYSTEMS
card2.description: LithTech is highly specialized in marine battery systems for vessels such as ferries, workboats, offshore platforms, and fish farms — with a strong focus on safety, modularity, and long design life.

card3.title: BATTERY MANAGEMENT & SYSTEM INTELLIGENCE
card3.description: LithTech independently develops advanced battery management systems (BMS), enabling: High-precision monitoring, Dynamic system optimization, Intelligent fault detection, Remote diagnostics and lifecycle management.

footprint.title: GLOBAL FOOTPRINT
footprint.intro: LithTech maintains a global presence supporting research, manufacturing, and service, including:
footprint.bullet3: Overseas subsidiaries and service centers in Europe, North America, Southeast Asia, Africa, and the Middle East

hero.title: GLOBAL PRESENCE. LOCAL EXECUTION
hero.subtitle: Baterino operates as a global energy infrastructure platform, supporting projects across regions through local partners and on-the-ground execution.

operatingGlobally.title: OPERATING GLOBALLY
operatingGlobally.description: Global standards, proven technologies, and a consistent delivery framework applied across regions and sectors.

deliveringLocally.title: DELIVERING LOCALLY
deliveringLocally.description: Projects delivered through local partners, adapted to regulatory, environmental, and operational realities on the ground.

regional.title: REGIONAL PRESENCE
regional.intro: We support projects across multiple regions, including:
regional.closing: Presence and project scope vary by region and are driven by local partnerships and project requirements.

partnerUp.title: PARTNER UP WITH US
partnerUp.intro: We are actively seeking local partners and distributors in new markets where reliable energy infrastructure is needed.
partnerUp.listLabel: We are open to collaboration with:

why.title: WHY ?
why.intro: Baterino partners to build sustainable, profitable energy infrastructure businesses.
why.bullet2: Ongoing after-sales and lifecycle service opportunities
why.bullet3: Centralized marketing, brand positioning, and go-to-market support
